notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Taylor Walls to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman grounds into a double play, second baseman Richie Palacios to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Gunnar Henderson out at 2nd. Adley Rutschman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson grounds out, second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Orioles challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Blaze Alexander steals (6) 2nd base.
